# Hakuto

> A free, open-source site builder for Claude Code. Clone, build with AI, deploy to Cloudflare.

Hakuto is a collection of Skills and workflows for building fast, modern Astro websites with Claude Code. It gives AI the context it needs to produce production-quality pages, from design systems and SEO to forms, blogs, and analytics.

## Key Details

- Built on Astro, Tailwind CSS v4, and shadcn/ui
- Deployed to Cloudflare Workers with PR preview URLs
- Skills teach Claude Code how to build pages, handle SEO, optimize images, and more
- Free and open source (MIT license)
- Repository: https://github.com/teamniteo/hakuto

## Getting Started

- [Quick Start](https://hakuto.dev/docs/setting-up/quick-start): Get your first site running in 5 minutes
- [Step-by-step Setup](https://hakuto.dev/start/prep): Guided walkthrough from accounts to deployment

## Documentation

- [Docs Home](https://hakuto.dev/docs): All guides and references
- [Quick Start](https://hakuto.dev/docs/setting-up/quick-start): First site in 5 minutes
- [Contact Form](https://hakuto.dev/docs/setting-up/contact-form): Add forms with Cloudflare Workers
- [Custom Domain](https://hakuto.dev/docs/setting-up/custom-domain): Connect your own domain
- [Environment Variables](https://hakuto.dev/docs/setting-up/environment-variables): Manage secrets and config
- [Update Hakuto](https://hakuto.dev/docs/setting-up/update-hakuto): Stay on the latest version
- [Create a Blog](https://hakuto.dev/docs/tips/create-a-blog): Add blog pages with listings and categories
- [Create Docs Pages](https://hakuto.dev/docs/tips/create-docs-pages): Add documentation with sidebar nav
- [Favicons](https://hakuto.dev/docs/tips/favicons): Custom favicons with dark/light mode
- [GitHub Newbies](https://hakuto.dev/docs/tips/github-newbies): Git and GitHub for non-developers
- [Site Launch](https://hakuto.dev/docs/tips/site-launch): Pre-launch checklist
- [Build Failed](https://hakuto.dev/docs/tips/build-failed): Diagnose and fix failed Cloudflare builds
- [Project Structure](https://hakuto.dev/docs/customization/project-structure): Directory layout and key files
- [Skills Customization](https://hakuto.dev/docs/customization/skills): Built-in and custom Skills

## Other Pages

- [Skills](https://hakuto.dev/skills): What Claude Code knows how to do
- [MCPs](https://hakuto.dev/mcps): Upcoming paid extensions
